channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-3065] sanity 73 failed with DNE
item.description:
== sanity test 73: multiple MDC requests (should not deadlock) == 00:32:43 (1364455963)
mkdir 1 for /mnt/lustre/d73-1
mkdir 1 for /mnt/lustre/d73-2
multiop /mnt/lustre/d73-1/f73-1 vO_c
TMPPIPE=/tmp/multiop_open_wait_pipe.13569
fail_loc=0x80000129
fail_loc=0
/mnt/lustre/d73-1/f73-1 has type file OK
/mnt/lustre/d73-1/f73-2 has type file OK
/mnt/lustre/d73-2/f73-3 has type file OK
rm: cannot remove `/mnt/lustre/d73-1': Input/output error
rm: cannot remove `/mnt/lustre/d73-2': Input/output error
sanity test_73: @@@@@@ FAIL: test_73 failed with 1
Trace dump:
= /work/lustre-release/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4019:error_noexit()
= /work/lustre-release/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4042:error()
= /work/lustre-release/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4281:run_one()
= /work/lustre-release/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4314:run_one_logged()
= /work/lustre-release/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4184:run_test()
= /work/lustre-release/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:5081:main()
Dumping lctl log to /tmp/test_logs/2013-03-27/234555/sanity.test_73.*.1364455990.log
oss: rsync: chown "/tmp/test_logs/2013-03-27/234555/.sanity.test_73.debug_log.mds.1364455990.log.AOtgQr" failed: Operation not permitted (1)
mds: rsync: chown "/tmp/test_logs/2013-03-27/234555/.sanity.test_73.debug_log.mds.1364455990.log.KBBm8k" failed: Operation not permitted (1)
mds: rsync: chown "/tmp/test_logs/2013-03-27/234555/.sanity.test_73.debug_log.oss.1364455990.log.VgGBos" failed: Operation not permitted (1)
oss: rsync: chown "/tmp/test_logs/2013-03-27/234555/.sanity.test_73.debug_log.oss.1364455990.log.iacDVy" failed: Operation not permitted (1)
mds: rsync: chown "/tmp/test_logs/2013-03-27/234555/.sanity.test_73.dmesg.mds.1364455990.log.94hhkD" failed: Operation not permitted (1)
oss: rsync: chown "/tmp/test_logs/2013-03-27/234555/.sanity.test_73.dmesg.mds.1364455990.log.gHqd5J" failed: Operation not permitted (1)
mds: rsync: chown "/tmp/test_logs/2013-03-27/234555/.sanity.test_73.dmesg.oss.1364455990.log.23QRWO" failed: Operation not permitted (1)
mds: rsync error: some files/attrs were not transferred (see previous errors) (code 23) at main.c(1039) [sender=3.0.6]
pdsh@client1: mds: ssh exited with exit code 23
oss: rsync: chown "/tmp/test_logs/2013-03-27/234555/.sanity.test_73.dmesg.oss.1364455990.log.Cwk8WV" failed: Operation not permitted (1)
oss: rsync error: some files/attrs were not transferred (see previous errors) (code 23) at main.c(1039) [sender=3.0.6]
pdsh@client1: oss: ssh exited with exit code 23
test_73 returned 1
FAIL 73 (36s)

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
